name: color/danger/125
description: Error / destructive (red). Blocking failures, irreversible actions. Shade 125 — primary fill on dark surfaces.

name: color/danger/150
description: Error / destructive (red). Blocking failures, irreversible actions. Shade 150 — soft border, disabled text.

name: color/danger/175
description: Error / destructive (red). Blocking failures, irreversible actions. Shade 175 — near-light tint.

name: color/danger/190
description: Error / destructive (red). Blocking failures, irreversible actions. Shade 190 — tint — subtle background hue.

name: color/danger/200
description: Error / destructive (red). Blocking failures, irreversible actions. Shade 200 — lightest extreme.

name: color/info/0
description: Informational notice (blue). Neutral context, hints. Shade 0 — darkest extreme.

name: color/info/10
description: Informational notice (blue). Neutral context, hints. Shade 10 — near-dark / OLED-safe deep.

name: color/info/25
description: Informational notice (blue). Neutral context, hints. Shade 25 — deep — high-emphasis text on light.

name: color/info/50
description: Informational notice (blue). Neutral context, hints. Shade 50 — strong — body text on light, solid idle on bright surfaces.

name: color/info/75
description: Informational notice (blue). Neutral context, hints. Shade 75 — secondary text on light.

name: color/info/100
description: Informational notice (blue). Neutral context, hints. Shade 100 — mid-tone — borders, disabled fills.

description: Informational notice (blue). Neutral context, hints. Shade 125 — primary fill on dark surfaces.

description: Informational notice (blue). Neutral context, hints. Shade 190 — tint — subtle background hue.

name: color/info/200
description: Informational notice (blue). Neutral context, hints. Shade 200 — lightest extreme.
